content.title: First Read Rule
body: If this is the agent's first time reading this README for the current work mission, read the entire README before opening deeper docs, following local routes, or relying on this corpus.

A first full pass is required once per current work mission, after a context reset, after a handoff or resume, or after the task materially changes. It is not required at every checkpoint in the same active mission.

After the first full pass, use the routing sections below to decide which local docs to reread or inspect next. At later checkpoints, reread only route-relevant sections unless the active `.core.*` route, roadmap, audit, or local stop condition requires a broader reread.
Do not treat this README as authority over App Behavior, architecture, implementation plans, proof, source, repo facts, product decisions, or explicit user instruction.
Purpose: Index for valid JSON examples that demonstrate the UX schema system with Jobs filters as the reference domain.
Audience: Agents and engineers learning, testing, validating, or generating UX JSON artifacts.
Keep In Sync With: JSON Schema files and model docs.
Update When: Required fields, enum values, example conventions, or schema versions change.
Does Not Cover: Actual Jobs product authority or implementation status.

content.title: Examples
body: This folder contains fully fleshed JSON examples. They use Jobs filters as a reference domain, but they are schema examples only and do not govern the Jobs product.
Files are prefixed in recommended reading order.
- `runtime-drift.example.json` shows a non-blocking row-inline runtimeAlignment field.
- `requirement-with-quality-assessment.example.json` shows row-inline uxQualityAssessment, runtimeAlignment, and behaviorRelations fields.

content.title: Routing
body: - learning schema-conformant UX/App Behavior examples without treating examples as product authority
- spec-package-manifest.example.json and coverage-index.example.json for package shape
- individual example JSON files for specific schema shapes
- the agent understands the reusable schema/example pattern without importing example facts into target authority

content.title: Route Intent Guidance
body: Use examples by example type and route through child READMEs before opening example leaf docs.
- For jobs-filters collection examples, read `jobs-filters-collection/README.doc.json` first.
- Use direct example files only after confirming the child README says they match the current authoring or audit task.
Examples are reference patterns only. They do not provide target App Behavior, source, product, architecture, implementation, or proof authority.
Stop when the agent can state which example family applies, which child README to read next, and what target authority must replace example facts.
